name: Chicken Salad Asian-Style
recipeIngredient: 1 can Chow mein noodles (3 oz can)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chicken, water chestnuts, green onions, sesame seeds, almonds, and poppy seeds.
2. Pour the dressing over the chicken mixture; gently toss to mix well.
3. Refrigerate the salad until chilled, about 2 hours.
4. At serving time, add the chicken mixture to the noodles and lettuce. Serve in portions of 6 servings.
DRESSING: In a 1-pint jar, combine 4 tablespoons sugar, 4 tablespoons cider vinegar, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper. Add 1/2 cup salad oil; shake to mix well.
